name: @ggsvelte/docs
description: ggsvelte docs site: SvelteKit + adapter-static. The gallery and per-example pages render from examples/manifest.ts (one source, three uses); the built output in build/ is the VR screenshot target.

scripts.build: bun ../../scripts/gen-docs-routes.ts --check && bun ../../scripts/gen-docs-search.ts --check && bun ../../scripts/gen-gallery-previews.ts --check && bun ../../scripts/gen-playground-seeds.ts --check && svelte-kit sync && vite build && bun ../../scripts/check-docs-metadata.ts && bun ../../scripts/docs-csp.ts
scripts.check: bun ../../scripts/gen-docs-routes.ts --check && bun ../../scripts/gen-docs-search.ts --check && bun ../../scripts/gen-gallery-previews.ts --check && bun ../../scripts/gen-playground-seeds.ts --check && svelte-kit sync && svelte-check --fail-on-warnings
